title: teucrium polium var. atlanticum
intro: Teucrium polium var. atlanticum, also known as the Atlantic Germander or Teucrium polium, is a variety of the Germander plant, a type of shrub that belongs to the mint family. Traditionally, Teucrium polium var. atlanticum has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory conditions, as well as its ability to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Teucrium polium var. atlanticum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
